title: kengyilia pendula
intro: Kengyilia pendula, also known as Needle Needle Grass, is a type of plant belonging to the grass family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Tibetan and Chinese traditional medicine, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, offering health benefits such as relief from congestion and improved respiratory function. In herbal preparations, Kengyilia pendula is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
